session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them. This is a documentation-only change so we mainly need to ensure the docs validate correctly.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` in the erk directory and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to validate documentation

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here are the key issues:
## Results Summary
**Status:** FAILED (Exit code 2)
**Issues Found:**
1. **Prettier formatting issues (2 files):** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
Code style issues found in these 2 files that need Prettier formatting.
**All Other Checks:** - Lint: PASSED - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations) - Format check: PASSED (1727 files already formatted) - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - ty (type checking): PASSED - Unit tests (erk): PASSED (6011 tests) - Unit tests (erk-dev): PASSED (136 tests) - Unit tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (115 tests) - Unit tests (erk-mcp): PASSED (28 tests)
**Root Cause:** The fast-ci pipeline failed because of Prettier formatting issues in 2 markdown documentation files: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need to be reformatted with Prettier to pass the fast-ci check.
